name: Astraltopia
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>希</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>望</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アストラル・ホープ
desc: If an Xyz Monster(s) is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can send 1 other card from your hand or field to the GY; add 1 "Xyz", "Onomat", "Zexal", or "Number" Spell/Trap, from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Astraltopia" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If an Xyz Monster(s) is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can send 1 other card from your hand or field to the GY; add 1 "Xyz", "Onomat", "Zexal", or "Number" Spell/Trap, from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Astraltopia" once per turn.
eff: If an Xyz Monster(s) is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can send 1 other card from your hand or field to the GY; add 1 "Xyz", "Onomat", "Zexal", or "Number" Spell/Trap, from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Astraltopia" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
